name: Router + Task Classification
description: Build the intelligence layer that makes Tide more than a passthrough. Classify tasks before sending to Pi, select appropriate models, introduce planning phase for complex tasks, and track costs.
notes: Router lives as a Pi extension (tide-router.ts) using before_agent_start hook.
Planner lives as a Pi extension (tide-planner.ts) for generating feature plans.
Router communicates to UI via ctx.ui.setStatus() → approvalStore.piStatus channel.
RouterStatus.tsx handles model_override by calling setPiModel() IPC.
Plans stored in .tide/plans/<slug>.json, read via Rust IPC (plans_list, plan_read).
PlanTab added as third tab in AgentPanel (Chat / Logs / Plan).
CostIndicator enhanced with click-to-expand popover showing token breakdown and model pricing.
Cost tracking uses token counts from Pi get_session_stats (no separate costStore needed).

tasks.title: Create tide-router.ts Pi extension
tasks.description: Pi extension that intercepts before_agent_start hook. Analyzes user prompt using heuristics: keyword matching (refactor, architect, redesign → complex), length, question marks, file count references. Classifies as quick/standard/complex. Pushes routing decision to UI via ctx.ui.setStatus('router', ...). Configurable via TIDE.md (router_enabled, router_mode, router_*_model).

tasks.title: Build Router Status UI
tasks.description: StatusBar component showing current routing decision: colored dot + tier label (Quick/Standard/Complex). Reads piStatus['router'] from approvalStore. Also handles piStatus['model_override'] to auto-switch model via setPiModel IPC. No separate routerStore needed — uses existing approvalStore.piStatus channel.

tasks.title: Create Feature Plan Generator (tide-planner.ts)
tasks.description: Pi extension that registers tide_plan_create, tide_plan_update, tide_plan_list tools. For complex tasks, injects planning instructions into systemPrompt. Plans stored in .tide/plans/<slug>.json. Pushes active plan to UI via ctx.ui.setStatus('planner', ...).

tasks.title: Build Plan Viewer Panel
tasks.description: New 'Plan' tab in AgentPanel. PlanTab.tsx shows active plan with progress bar, step checklist, and historical plans. planStore.ts subscribes to approvalStore.piStatus['planner'] for real-time updates. Rust IPC commands plans_list and plan_read for loading historical plans from .tide/plans/.

tasks.title: Enhance Cost Tracker
tasks.description: Enhanced CostIndicator.tsx with click-to-expand popover showing input/output token breakdown, cache stats, total cost, and per-model pricing reference. MODEL_PRICING table covers Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, Gemini Flash/Pro. No separate costStore needed — uses sessionStats from streamStore.
